extra.message: The student name is directly formatted into the SQL query string using string formatting ('%'), creating a high-severity SQL injection vulnerability. It should use parameterized queries by passing variables to cur.execute(q, params) instead.

cwe: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')

extra.message: Jinja2 template engine is initialized with autoescape=False. This globally disables Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) protections, allowing any user-provided content (like student names or course reviews) to be executed as malicious JavaScript in the browser.

cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

extra.message: The csrf_middleware has been intentionally commented out from the Application middlewares list. This completely disables Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) protections for all state-changing endpoints in the application.

The Redis session storage is initialized with httponly=False. This insecure configuration allows client-side JavaScript to access session cookies, significantly increasing the risk and impact of XSS vulnerabilities enabling session hijacking.

The application uses the MD5 algorithm for hashing and verifying user passwords. MD5 is a cryptographically broken and obsolete hashing algorithm that is vulnerable to collision and rapid brute-force dictionary attacks.

cwe: CWE-327: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm

extra.message: The students view processes POST requests to create new student records but lacks any authentication or authorization checks. Any unauthenticated user can invoke this endpoint to modify database state.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function

extra.message: The courses view processes POST requests to create new courses but lacks any authentication or authorization checks. Any unauthenticated user can invoke this endpoint to insert courses.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function

extra.message: The review view processes POST requests to submit course reviews but lacks any authentication or authorization checks. Any unauthenticated user can submit reviews.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function

extra.message: The evaluate view processes POST requests to grade and evaluate students but lacks any authentication checks. Any unauthenticated user can assign marks to students.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function
